body.notes: cc_send cascade testing blocked: Igor says "I will call X" but does not emit tool call schema. Fix options: (A) tier escalation for code_ref habit dispatch, (B) have cc_send habits use code_ref bypass rather than LLM tool generation, (C) add structured tool-call format to llama3.2:1b prompting.
body.title: #Cognition tier.2 LLM tool dispatch reliability — llama3.2:1b generates intent text without structured tool call JSON
body.result: Detect [CODING SPRINT] in background job dispatch → force is_user_turn=True + complexity=high regardless of author. Routes to OR agentic loop (haiku/sonnet) which handles multi-step tool execution natively. 1377 tests pass.
